title: heloseris palustris
intro: Heloseris palustris, also known as swamp false rosemary, is a perennial plant that belongs to the family Campanulaceae, characterized by its small, blue or purple flowers. The medicinal properties of Heloseris palustris include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful for treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of consuming Heloseris palustris include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Heloseris palustris can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
